title: Best Farm Tours On The San Francisco Peninsula, California
content: The San Francisco Peninsula logo. # The Best Farm Tours on The San Francisco Peninsula. Get ready to learn about farm life here on The San Francisco Peninsula! This area is home to over **50 working farms**, and several are embracing agritourism to give visitors a behind-the-scenes look through farm tours, **farm stands**, **u-pick options**, and cooking classes. From exploring farms with animals and local produce to learning about sustainable aquaponic farming, bring the whole family out for a day of fun. Visitors to the farm can see the milking goat herd, as well as several other farm animals. While drop-ins are welcomed, tours allow visitors to get closer to the animals and learn more about dairy farm life. Looking for more ways to explore the rich agriculture here on The San Francisco Peninsula? Learn about the San Mateo County **As Fresh As It Gets** program and view our **guide to Farmers’ Markets.**. ### Guide to Farmers’ Markets on The San Francisco Peninsula. ##### The San Francisco Peninsula.

title: Reviews - San Francisco - A Taste of SF Tours
content: > “We loved our morning tour of San Fran, Muir Woods and Sausalito. Michael was our guide and he was extremely informative about the city. Muir Woods was quite chilly in the morning but we had the perfect amount of time to walk quite a bit and visit the gift shop. It was nice and quiet in the woods. On the way back we stopped at a fort for a unique view of the bridge and had a few minutes to take pictures. > Muir Woods and Sausalito Afternoon Tour Small-Group Half-Day. My husband and I spent the weekend in San Francisco and wanted to explore outside of the city. We chose the Muir Woods & Sausalito + Half-Day Wine Country Tour, and it exceeded our expectations! The beautiful views near the Golden Gate Bridge, walking the trails among the gorgeous trees of Muir Woods, visiting the beautiful city of Sausalito, and the unique wine tasting experiences in Sonoma made for an unforgettable day.
